前線基地周辺の植物を観察したいと言うマニョリアの願いを聞き入れ、<br>気晴らし:
I agreed to Magnolia's request to observe the plants around the
Frontline Base and accompanied her on a forest walk to clear my head.
あっ！ あそこに咲いているのは……！: Ah! That flower blooming over there...!
マニョリアが駆けて行く。<br>さっそく何か見つけたらしい。: Magnolia dashed off. She seemed to have already found something.
これ……覚えてる？<br>ルディアさんのお店の前で咲いていた、珍しいお花！:
This... do you remember? It's that rare flower that was blooming in
front of Ludia's shop!
マニョリアが指差すのは、娼館の前で咲いていた花と同じものだった。:
The flower Magnolia pointed to was the same one that had bloomed in
front of the brothel.
あぁ。確かにあの時の花だな。<br>そういえばルディアに教えてもらったのか？ こ:
Ah, yeah, that's the flower from before. So, did Ludia tell you about
it? About this flower...
ううん……<br>この森に咲いているってことだけしかまだ……: No... I only know that it grows in this forest... that's all...
おい！ なんかこの花、変な動きしてないか！？<br>な、なんかヤバそうな雰囲気が: Hey! Isn't this flower moving weirdly? It feels dangerous...
突如その花から花粉のようなものが噴き出した。<br>花を覗き込んでいた魔法植物は:
Suddenly, a pollen-like substance burst from the flower. The magical
plant, which had been peering into it, inhaled a full dose.
ゲホゲホゲホッ！<br>う、うぅ……なんだ、こりゃ……ぐあぁぁぁっ！！: Cough, cough, cough! Ugh... what the hell is this... Gwaaaah!
魔法植物が苦しげに呻く。: The magical plant groaned in pain.
次の瞬間、軋むような音を立てて魔法植物が変化し始めた。:
The next moment, the magical plant began to change, emitting a
creaking sound.
こりゃ、マズイぜ……<br>受粉……しちまった、みたいだ……うぅ……:
This is bad...
Looks like I've been pollinated... Ugh...
